papers.summary: Every Transformer architecture dedicates enormous capacity to learning rich representations in semantic embedding space -- yet the rotation manifold acted upon by Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE) has been treated as a fixed, hand-crafted structure, populated only by discrete ordinal indices. papers.summary: Linear activation steering is a powerful approach for eliciting the capabilities of large language models and specializing their behavior using limited labeled data. While effective, existing methods often apply a fixed steering strength to all tokens, resulting in inconsistent steering quality across diverse input prompts. In this work, we introduce Contextual Linear Activation Steering (CLAS), a method that dynamically adapts linear activation steering to context-dependent steering strengths.

radar.summary_zh: 當人工標註成本高昂且標準指標忽略以利害關係人為中心的目標時，評估細緻入微的對話式旅行推薦是一項挑戰。我們研究 LLM-as-a-Judge 在永續城市旅行清單中對四個維度（相關性、多樣性、永續性和受歡迎程度平衡）的評估，並提出一個三階段校準框架：(1) 使用多個 LLM 進行基準評估，(2) 專家評估以識別系統性偏差，以及 (3) 透過規則進行特定維度校準
radar.title: Multi-Dimensional Evaluation of Sustainable City Trips with LLM-as-a-Judge and Human-in-the-Loop
radar.title_zh: 利用 LLM-as-a-Judge 和 Human-in-the-Loop 對永續城市旅行進行多維度評估

links.title: TextGround4M: A Prompt-Aligned Dataset for Layout-Aware Text Rendering

primary_link.title: TextGround4M: A Prompt-Aligned Dataset for Layout-Aware Text Rendering

radar.summary: Despite recent advances in text-to-image generation, models still struggle to accurately render prompt-specified text with correct spatial layout -- especially in multi-span, structured settings. This challenge is driven not only by the lack of datasets that align prompts with the exact text and layout expected in the image, but also by the absence of effective metrics for evaluating layout quality. To address these issues, we introduce TextGround4M, a large-scale dataset of over 4 million promp
radar.summary_zh: 儘管文字到圖像生成（text-to-image generation）取得了最新進展，模型仍難以精確渲染提示中指定的文字，並確保正確的空間佈局——尤其是在多跨度、結構化設定中。這一挑戰不僅源於缺乏將提示與圖像中預期的確切文字和佈局對齊的資料集，也源於缺乏評估佈局品質的有效指標。為了解決這些問題，我們推出了 TextGround4M，這是一個包含超過 400 萬個提示的大規模資料集
radar.title: TextGround4M: A Prompt-Aligned Dataset for Layout-Aware Text Rendering
radar.title_zh: TextGround4M：用於佈局感知文字渲染的提示對齊資料集

links.title: Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application

primary_link.title: Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application

radar.summary: On-device Small Language Models (SLMs) promise fully offline, private AI experiences for mobile users (no cloud dependency, no data leaving the device). This paper presents a longitudinal practitioner case study documenting the engineering challenges of integrating SLMs (Gemma 4 E2B, 2.6B parameters; Qwen3 0.6B, 600M parameters) into Palabrita, a production Android word-guessing game. Over a 5-day development sprint comprising 204 commits (~90 directly
radar.summary_zh: 設備端 Small Language Models (SLMs) 為行動用戶承諾提供完全離線、私密的 AI 體驗（無雲端依賴，資料不離開設備）。但這項承諾在實踐中是否能實現？本文提出了一項長期實踐者案例研究，記錄了將 SLMs（Gemma 4 E2B，2.6B 參數；Qwen3 0.6B，600M 參數）整合到 Palabrita（一款生產環境的 Android 猜詞遊戲）中的工程挑戰。在一個為期 5 天、包含 204 次提交（約 90 次直接相關）的開發衝刺中
radar.title: Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application
radar.title_zh: 少即是多：行動應用程式中設備端 Small Language Model 整合的工程挑戰

links.title: Can LLMs Act as Historians? Evaluating Historical Research Capabilities of LLMs via the Chinese Imperial Examination

primary_link.title: Can LLMs Act as Historians? Evaluating Historical Research Capabilities of LLMs via the Chinese Imperial Examination

radar.summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have increasingly assisted in historical tasks such as text processing, their capacity for professional-level historical reasoning remains underexplored. radar.summary_zh: 儘管大型語言模型 (LLMs) 在文本處理等歷史任務中提供了越來越多的協助，但其在專業級別歷史推理方面的能力仍未被充分探索。現有基準測試主要評估基礎知識廣度或詞彙理解，未能捕捉歷史研究核心的高階技能，例如證據推理。為彌補這一差距，我們引入了 ProHist-Bench，這是一個以中國科舉考試為基礎的新穎基準測試。
radar.title: Can LLMs Act as Historians? Evaluating Historical Research Capabilities of LLMs via the Chinese Imperial Examination
radar.title_zh: LLMs 能否扮演歷史學家角色？透過中國科舉考試評估 LLMs 的歷史研究能力

links.title: Probing CLIP's Comprehension of 360-Degree Textual and Visual Semantics

primary_link.title: Probing CLIP's Comprehension of 360-Degree Textual and Visual Semantics

radar.summary: The dream of instantly creating rich 360-degree panoramic worlds from text is rapidly becoming a reality, yet a crucial gap exists in our ability to reliably evaluate their semantic alignment. Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) models, standard AI evaluators, predominantly trained on perspective image-text pairs, face an open question regarding their understanding of the unique characteristics of 360-degree panoramic image-text pairs. This paper addresses this gap by first introducin
radar.summary_zh: 從文本即時創建豐富的 360 度全景世界的夢想正迅速成為現實，然而，在可靠評估其語義對齊方面存在一個關鍵的空白。Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) 模型作為標準的 AI 評估器，主要在透視圖像-文本對上進行訓練，對於其理解 360 度全景圖像-文本對獨特特徵的能力，仍是一個懸而未決的問題。本文透過首次引入來解決這一空白。
radar.title: Probing CLIP's Comprehension of 360-Degree Textual and Visual Semantics
radar.title_zh: 探究 CLIP 對 360 度文本和視覺語義的理解能力

links.title: Aligned Multi-View Scripts for Universal Chart-to-Code Generation

primary_link.title: Aligned Multi-View Scripts for Universal Chart-to-Code Generation

radar.summary: Chart-to-code generation converts a chart image into an executable plotting script, enabling faithful reproduction and editable visualizations. Existing methods are largely Python-centric, limiting practical use and overlooking a critical source of supervision: the same chart can be expressed by semantically equivalent scripts in different plotting languages. radar.summary_zh: Chart-to-code 生成將圖表圖像轉換為可執行的繪圖腳本，從而實現忠實再現和可編輯的可視化。現有方法大多以 Python 為中心，限制了實際應用，並忽略了一個關鍵的監督來源：同一個圖表可以透過不同繪圖語言中語義等價的腳本來表達。為彌補這一差距，我們引入了 Chart2NCode，這是一個包含 176K 個圖表的資料集，這些圖表與 Python、R 和 LaTeX 中對齊的腳本配對，可以渲染出可視化內容。
radar.title: Aligned Multi-View Scripts for Universal Chart-to-Code Generation
radar.title_zh: 用於通用 Chart-to-Code 生成的對齊多視角腳本

links.title: Generating Place-Based Compromises Between Two Points of View

radar.title_zh: 生成基於地點的兩種觀點之間的妥協方案

links.title: Interoceptive machine framework: Toward interoception-inspired regulatory architectures in artificial intelligence

primary_link.title: Interoceptive machine framework: Toward interoception-inspired regulatory architectures in artificial intelligence

radar.summary: This review proposes an integrative framework grounded on interoception and embodied AI-termed the interoceptive machine framework-that translates biologically inspired principles of internal-state regulation into computational architectures for adaptive autonomy. Interoception, conceived as the monitoring, integration, and regulation of internal signals, has proven relevant for understanding adaptive behavior in biological systems. The proposed framework organizes interoceptive contributions in
radar.summary_zh: 這篇評論提出了一個整合性框架，其基礎是內感受和具身 AI，並將其稱為「內感受機器框架」。該框架將受生物啟發的內部狀態調節原理轉化為計算架構，以實現自適應自主性。內感受，被定義為內部信號的監測、整合和調節，已被證明與理解生物系統中的自適應行為相關。所提出的框架組織了內感受的貢獻。

radar.title_zh: 內感受機器框架：邁向人工智慧中受內感受啟發的調節架構

links.title: A Survey on Split Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning: Models, Systems, and Privacy Optimizations

primary_link.title: A Survey on Split Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning: Models, Systems, and Privacy Optimizations

radar.summary: Fine-tuning unlocks large language models (LLMs) for specialized applications, but its high computational cost often puts it out of reach for resource-constrained organizations. While cloud platforms could provide the needed resources, data privacy concerns make sharing sensitive information with third parties risky. radar.summary_zh: Fine-tuning 能夠為特定應用釋放 Large Language Models (LLMs) 的潛力，但其高昂的計算成本常使資源受限的組織望塵莫及。雖然雲端平台可以提供所需的資源，但資料隱私問題使得與第三方分享敏感資訊存在風險。一個有前景的解決方案是將模型在 client 和 server 之間劃分的 LLM fine-tuning 的 Split Learning，其透過交換中間資訊實現協作且安全的訓練。
radar.title: A Survey on Split Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning: Models, Systems, and Privacy Optimizations
radar.title_zh: 關於用於 LLM Fine-Tuning 的 Split Learning 之調查：模型、系統與隱私最佳化

primary_link.title: How Personal Characteristics Shape User Exploration of Diverse Movie Recommendations with a LLM-Based Multi-Agent System

radar.summary: Diversity is an important evaluation criterion for recommender systems beyond accuracy, yet users differ in their willingness to engage with novel and diverse content. In this work, we investigate how a Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent system supports users' exploration of diverse recommendations, and how individual characteristics shape user experiences. We conducted a between-subjects user study (N = 100) comparing a single-agent system (baseline) with a multi-agent system for movi
radar.summary_zh: 對於推薦系統而言，多元性是超越準確性的一個重要評估標準，然而用戶參與新穎和多元內容的意願各不相同。在這項工作中，我們研究了基於 Large Language Model (LLM) 的 multi-agent system 如何支援用戶探索多元推薦，以及個人特徵如何塑造用戶體驗。我們進行了一項受試者間使用者研究 (N = 100)，比較了單代理系統 (baseline) 與用於電影推薦的 multi-agent system。
radar.title: How Personal Characteristics Shape User Exploration of Diverse Movie Recommendations with a LLM-Based Multi-Agent System
radar.title_zh: 個人特徵如何透過基於 LLM 的 Multi-Agent System 塑造用戶對多元電影推薦的探索

radar.summary_zh: Representation learning 對於 NLP 至關重要，但建立在不同計算預算下皆能良好運作的 embeddings 具挑戰性。Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) 透過 nested embeddings 提供了一種靈活的 inference 範式；然而，學習這類結構需要明確協調資訊在 embedding dimensionality 和 model depth 上的排列方式。在這項工作中，我們提出了 MIPIC (Matryoshka Representation Learning via Self-Distilled Intra-Relational Alignment
radar.title: MIPIC: Matryoshka Representation Learning via Self-Distilled Intra-Relational and Progressive Information Chaining

links.title: SAGE: Sparse Adaptive Guidance for Dependency-Aware Tabular Data Generation

radar.summary_zh: 在隱私敏感和資源匱乏的領域中，生成高擬真度的 synthetic tabular data 仍然是提升資料可用性的一項關鍵挑戰。最近的方法透過將表格列表示為 sequences 來利用 LLMs，但存在兩個根本限制：(1) 它們密集地建模 feature dependencies，引入了 spurious correlations；(2) 它們假設 features 之間的關係是靜態的，忽略了這些 dependencies 如何隨 feature values 而變化。為克服這些限制

links.title: Why AI Harms Can't Be Fixed One Identity at a Time: What 5300 Incident Reports Reveal About Intersectionality

primary_link.title: Why AI Harms Can't Be Fixed One Identity at a Time: What 5300 Incident Reports Reveal About Intersectionality

radar.summary: AI risk assessment is the primary tool for identifying harms caused by AI systems. These include intersectional harms, which arise from the interaction between identity categories (e.g., class and skin tone) and which do not occur, or occur differently, when those categories are considered separately. Yet existing AI risk assessments are still built around isolated identity categories, and when intersections are considered, they focus almost exclusively on race and gender. Drawing on a large-sca
radar.summary_zh: AI 風險評估是識別 AI 系統造成危害的主要工具。這些危害包括 intersectional harms，其產生於 identity categories（例如，階級和膚色）之間的互動，並且當這些 categories 分開考慮時，不會發生或以不同方式發生。然而，現有的 AI 風險評估仍然圍繞著孤立的 identity categories 建構，當考慮 intersections 時，它們幾乎完全集中在種族和性別上。藉由大規模的

links.title: Primitive Recursion without Composition: Dynamical Characterizations, from Neural Networks to Polynomial ODEs

primary_link.title: Primitive Recursion without Composition: Dynamical Characterizations, from Neural Networks to Polynomial ODEs

radar.summary:
What do recurrent neural networks, polynomial ODEs, and discrete polynomial maps each bring to computation, and what do they lack? All three operate over the continuum--real-valued states evolved by real-valued dynamics--even when the target functions are discrete. We study them through primitive recursion.

radar.summary_zh: 遞歸類神經網路 (recurrent neural networks)、多項式 ODEs (polynomial ODEs) 和離散多項式映射 (discrete polynomial maps) 各自為計算帶來了什麼，又缺乏了什麼？這三者都作用於連續統——透過實值動力學演化的實值狀態——即使目標函數是離散的。我們透過 primitive recursion 來研究它們。我們證明 primitive recursion 在這三個框架中都具有等價的特性描述：固定遞歸 ReLU network 的有界迭代，以及固定多項式的魯棒計算。

radar.summary_zh: 人類影片包含豐富的 manipulation priors，但將其用於 robot learning 仍然困難，因為原始觀察結果糾纏了場景理解、人類運動和特定於實體的動作。我們介紹 MoT-HRA，這是一個分層的 vision-language-action 框架，它從大規模人類示範中學習 human-intention priors。我們首先策劃了 HA-2.2M，這是一個 2.2M-episode 的 action-language dataset，透過以手為中心的過濾、空間重建等從異構人類影片中重建而來。

links.title: Hierarchical Behaviour Spaces

links.title: Build Strands Agents with SageMaker AI models and MLflow

primary_link.title: Build Strands Agents with SageMaker AI models and MLflow

radar.summary: In this post, we demonstrate how to build AI agents using Strands Agents SDK with models deployed on SageMaker AI endpoints. You will learn how to deploy foundation models from SageMaker JumpStart, integrate them with Strands Agents, and establish production-grade observability using SageMaker Serverless MLflow for agent tracing. We also cover how to implement A/B testing across multiple model variants and evaluate agent performance using MLflow metrics and show how you can build, deploy, and continuously improve AI agents on infrastructure you control.
radar.title: Build Strands Agents with SageMaker AI models and MLflow

links.title: How Popsa used Amazon Nova to inspire customers with personalised title suggestions

primary_link.title: How Popsa used Amazon Nova to inspire customers with personalised title suggestions

radar.summary: In this post, we share how we applied Amazon Bedrock and the Amazon Nova family of models to reimagine our Title Suggestion feature. By combining metadata, computer vision, and retrieval-augmented generative AI, we now automatically generate creative, brand-aligned titles and subtitles across 12 languages. Using the unified API of Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic’s Claude 3 Haiku, and Amazon Nova Lite and Pro, we improved quality, reduced cost, and cut response times. This resulted in higher customer satisfaction, measurable uplifts in engagement and purchase rates, and over 5.5 million personalised titles generated in 2025.
radar.title: How Popsa used Amazon Nova to inspire customers with personalised title suggestions
